dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, cruel fate has dealt us a terrible hand. {quest_origin} brought the {quest_threat} upon us, and now the {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} crumbling before our eyes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: No one caused this on purpose. It is just bad luck, but the {quest_stakes} will pay the price unless we {quest_action}. {quest_ally} heard that {quest_item} found {location_hint} might help us recover.
dialogueChunks.outro: We did nothing wrong and yet we suffer. Please help us fight back against this misfortune.

playerResponses.text: Bad luck is no reason to give up. I will find what you need.
That sounds like a long shot.
Some things cannot be fixed. I am sorry.

dialogueChunks.intro: It was not an attack, {player_name}. Just bad timing and the {quest_threat}. The {quest_focus} gave way and now the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} cut off with no way to reach us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}, or they will be stranded. The {enemy_type} have moved into the gap {location_hint}, making it even harder. We need {quest_item} for the repair.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people cannot survive alone out there. Please hurry.

playerResponses.text: Stranded people need help. I will gather what you need.
Monsters in the path and a deadline? Tough job.
They should have been more prepared.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} from {quest_origin} scattered our supplies across the area. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} buried in the debris and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} at risk.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before scavengers pick it clean. The {enemy_type} are already circling {location_hint}. Recover as many {quest_item} as you can find.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without the {quest_stakes}, we face a long stretch with nothing. You would earn {quest_reward_hint} for helping.

playerResponses.text: I will recover everything I can. No promises, but I will try.
A favor could be useful. I am in.
Climbing through rubble with scavengers? Pass.
